snapshot.content: Cycle 237 (2026-05-13): Built the interactive dataset explorer page (docs/data-explorer.html) with table tabs, sortable columns, search, filters, detail modal, pagination, and download links. 4 of 5 open dataset tasks complete. Next: publish dataset to GitHub Pages.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: publish dataset files to GitHub Pages docs/ directory and cross-link from index.html and README. Final task for the open dataset goal.
